---
title: "H23 Live Monitor"
---

This page embeds the near-real-time `/data/incoming` inventory monitor generated on the `h23` runner.
Scheduled refreshes target a 5-minute cadence (plus GitHub Pages deployment latency).

If the embedded dashboard does not load in your browser, open it directly:
[Open H23 live monitor](h23-live-monitor/).

<iframe
  src="h23-live-monitor/"
  title="H23 Live Monitor"
  style="width: 100%; min-height: 900px; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8; border-radius: 6px;"
  loading="lazy"
  referrerpolicy="no-referrer"
>
</iframe>
